description: Legal document. A damaged legal document, probably a bill of release. Involves Ahuv, sums of 55 dinars, 44 dinars, 13 dinars, and half of a house. Signed by צדקה הכהן בן דוד נ"ע, Ṣedaqa b. David ha-Kohen (also signed T-S 12.75 (PGPID 16799) no later than 1093 CE). AA
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
